content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Debugging with AI to Solve Monetization Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to monetize your coding skills. Learn how to debug faster with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver premium results to clients.
content.answer_block: The gap between coding and income is often slow debugging. By integrating AI-driven debugging into your workflow, you slash delivery times by 80%. Using Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for rapid CLI-based remediation, you transform from a slow coder into a high-velocity, high-margin freelance expert.
content.intro:
You’ve spent countless hours in the trenches, wrestling with syntax errors and elusive bugs that turn a profitable project into a bottomless pit of unpaid labor. The frustration is real: you have the technical skill, but your velocity is throttled by manual troubleshooting, leaving your hourly rate effectively crippled.

But the landscape has shifted. The most successful builders are no longer 'coding' in the traditional sense; they are orchestrating AI to eliminate technical debt in real-time. By mastering the synergy between Antigravity and Claude Code, you stop fighting the code and start shipping the solution, turning your technical bottleneck into a high-leverage competitive advantage.

steps.title: Establish the Debugging Context
steps.description: Before fixing errors, define the scope of the failure. Use Antigravity to map out the dependency graph to understand where the breakage originates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current codebase structure and identify the most likely points of failure in the authentication middleware.

steps.title: Automated Error Isolation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to read the stack trace and correlate it with existing logic. This eliminates the guesswork of manual console logging.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a diagnostic test suite that targets the identified failure points in the user controller.

steps.title: Injecting AI-Driven Fixes
steps.description: Apply targeted patches generated by Claude Code. Ensure the fix maintains consistency with the original architectural patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the authentication logic to handle edge cases where session tokens are null, following the existing architectural pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'refactor auth.ts to handle null tokens gracefully'

steps.title: Regression Validation
steps.description: Verify that your fix didn't break secondary systems. Automation is the key to maintaining client trust and code integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run a regression analysis on the entire project to ensure the new changes haven't introduced side effects.

steps.title: Client-Ready Documentation
steps.description: Generate professional technical documentation based on the bug fix to demonstrate value to your client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a concise technical summary of the bug, the fix, and the preventive measures taken for client delivery.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'write a summary of changes in CHANGELOG.md'

pro_tips: Always use Claude Code to commit changes with structured, conventional commit messages to keep your freelance billing history clean.
Treat your Antigravity prompts as 'System Instructions'—pre-load them with your preferred coding style guides to maintain consistency across all client projects.
When facing a complex bug, ask Claude Code to 'explain the logic of this file' before attempting a fix to avoid destructive refactoring.
Use Antigravity to generate 'TODO' lists for your clients; it positions you as a strategic partner rather than just a code monkey.
If a fix seems too complex for AI, break the problem into the smallest possible functional unit before prompting—AI excels at granular tasks.
content.next_steps: Select one active client project, perform a full audit using the steps above, and document the time saved to justify your next rate increase.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting slow debugging cycles eat your margins. Master the tools that turn hours of frustration into minutes of precision. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
